entity.summary: Automated-market-maker decentralized exchange within the Fathom Protocol ecosystem, providing token swaps and decentralized liquidity pools for XDC and FXD-related assets.
entity.notes: HEI models Fathom AMM and Fathom DEX source rows as one exchange entity. Current first-party website and documentation describe the DEX as an active Fathom ecosystem trading hub with swaps, liquidity pools, and automated market making.

evidence.title: Fathom Protocol official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party site links the live Fathom application and explicitly identifies Fathom DEX as its own stableswap DEX within the ecosystem.

evidence.title: Fathom DEX documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Fathom DEX as a permissionless, trustless decentralized exchange with liquidity pools, automated market making, and token swaps.

evidence.title: Fathom AMM and DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry corroborates Fathom exchange functionality; AMM and DEX source rows are consolidated into one HEI entity.
